title: Optimization mods
description: all the mods and txt you need!
body:
⚡ Smooth & Simple: Performance + QoL Essentials
– Lightweight, Fast, User-Friendly

This modpack is built for players who want Minecraft to run smoother, load faster, and feel more comfortable to play — without changing the core vanilla experience.

Every included mod has a clear purpose: boosting FPS, reducing lag, improving stability, and adding small quality-of-life upgrades that make everyday gameplay easier and more intuitive.

🔥 Key Features

- Performance-optimized – higher FPS, faster chunk loading, fewer stutters

- Lightweight – no bloat, only necessary improvements

- Quality-of-life upgrades – cleaner UI, helpful shortcuts, smoother interactions

- Stable & reliable – essential libraries included for full compatibility

- Vanilla-friendly – the game feels the same, just better

🎯 Perfect for:

- Players who want Minecraft to run as smoothly as possible

- Low-end and high-end PCs looking for stability and speed

- People who like clean, simple modpacks without unnecessary extras

- Anyone who wants small improvements that make the game more enjoyable

If you want Minecraft that’s faster, cleaner, and more comfortable — this modpack delivers exactly that.

Enjoy!
